summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-1 through REQ-4) with complete evidence across backend and frontend changes. Label dimensions are updated to 58mm×43mm, barcode width calculations are implemented with clamping logic, prefix validation triggers error messages with automatic input clearing, and duplicate serial detection is implemented with a Set-based tracking mechanism.

hallucinated_features.description: Backend migration system with schema versioning
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest explicitly states 'Altering backend schema or migration logic' as a non-goal, yet a new migration.mo file was added implementing a migration.run function that transforms label settings

hallucinated_features.description: Calibration offset controls in label settings
hallucinated_features.reason: Calibration offset fields (calibrationOffsetXmm, calibrationOffsetYmm) were added to ExtendedLabelSettings and mentioned in the UI descriptions, but no calibration feature was requested in the BuildRequest
